dishes.name: Cassava Leaves
dishes.description: A popular dish made by simmering cassava leaves in palm oil with meat, fish, and spices. Often served with rice.

dishes.name: Jollof Rice
dishes.description: A flavorful one-pot dish of rice cooked in a rich tomato and pepper sauce, often with chicken, beef, or fish.

dishes.name: Groundnut Soup
dishes.description: A thick, savory stew made from groundnuts (peanuts), vegetables, and meat, usually served over rice.

dishes.name: Fufu and Sawa Soup
dishes.description: Fufu is a starchy side made from cassava or plantain, paired with a slimy, spicy sawa-sawa-based soup.

dishes.name: Krain Krain
dishes.description: A green vegetable sauce made from potato leaves or spinach, cooked with palm oil, spices, and assorted meats.

dishes.name: Paella
dishes.description: A traditional Spanish rice dish made with saffron, seafood, chicken, and vegetables.

dishes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
dishes.description: A creamy pasta dish made with eggs, cheese (Pecorino Romano), pancetta, and black pepper.

dishes.name: Coq au Vin
dishes.description: Chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms, onions, and bacon—a French countryside classic.

dishes.name: Bratwurst with Sauerkraut
dishes.description: Grilled German sausages served with tangy fermented cabbage and mustard.

dishes.name: Fish and Chips
dishes.description: Crispy battered fish served with thick-cut fries and often mushy peas or tartar sauce.
